parameters.query: INSERT INTO ai_extractions (run_id, company_domain, company_data, confidence_scores, model_used, processing_time_ms) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5, $6) RETURNING id, run_id, created_at;

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [($node['Prepare Prompt'].json.run_id || ''), ($node['Prepare Prompt'].json.company_domain || ''), JSON.stringify($json.parsedData || {}), JSON.stringify(($json.parsedData || {}).confidence_scores || {}), ($json.modelUsed || 'unknown'), (Date.now() - ($node['Prepare Prompt'].json.processingStart || Date.now()))] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE scenario_queue SET status = 'completed', output_data = $1::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE run_id = $2 RETURNING id, run_id, status;
